settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.content:
This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the personal information of visitors and customers who interact with our online store. By using our site or placing an order, you agree to the practices described below.

1. Information We Collect

We collect the following categories of personal information:

  • Contact details — name, billing and shipping address, phone number, and email address.
  • Order information — items purchased, order totals, and payment confirmations (we never see or store full payment card numbers).
  • Account credentials — if you create an account, the email and password you choose.
  • Communication records — messages you send to our support team.
  • Technical data — device type, browser, IP address, and basic analytics about how you use the site.

2. How We Collect It

We collect information directly from you when you place an order, create an account, sign up for our email list, or contact our team. We also collect technical data automatically through cookies and similar technologies when you browse the site.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use personal information to:

  • process orders, payments, and shipping;
  • respond to your questions and support requests;
  • send order confirmations, shipping updates, and (with your permission) marketing messages;
  • prevent fraud and keep the site secure;
  • improve our products, website, and customer experience;
  • comply with legal obligations.

4. Who We Share It With

We only share personal information with third parties who need it to deliver our service to you:

  • Payment processors — to take and verify your payment.
  • Shipping carriers and fulfilment partners — to deliver your order.
  • Hosting and platform providers (including our e-commerce platform) — to run the website itself.
  • Analytics and marketing tools — to understand site performance and, where you have opted in, send you relevant messages.
  • Legal or regulatory authorities — where we are required to disclose information by law.

We do not sell your personal information.

5. Cookies & Similar Technologies

We use cookies to remember your cart, keep you signed in, measure site performance, and — with your consent — show you relevant marketing. You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings; some site features may stop working if you do.

6. How Long We Keep It

We keep order records for as long as required by tax and accounting law, typically a minimum of seven years. Marketing data is kept until you unsubscribe. Account data is kept for as long as your account is active.

7. How We Protect It

We use industry-standard technical and organisational measures — including encryption in transit, access controls, and regular security reviews — to protect your information. No system is perfectly secure, but we take this seriously.

8. Your Rights

Depending on where you live, you may have the right to:

  • ask us for a copy of the personal information we hold about you;
  • correct information that is wrong;
  • ask us to delete your information (subject to legal retention);
  • object to or restrict certain kinds of processing;
  • withdraw consent to marketing at any time;
  • lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

To exercise any of these rights, email us at hello@yourstore.com.

9. International Transfers

We operate internationally, which means your information may be transferred to, stored, or processed in countries other than the one you live in. Where required by law, we use appropriate safeguards (such as standard contractual clauses) to protect your data during those transfers.

10. Children

Our store is not intended for children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top and — for material changes — notify you by email or a notice on the site.

12. Contact

Questions about this policy or your data? Write to us at hello@yourstore.com.
